PowerShell($pkg="com.tr.atlas.trac"; echo "=== force-stop ==="; adb shell am force-stop $pkg; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; echo "=== rm db files ==="; adb shell run-as $pkg sh -c "rm -f databases/atlas_trac_db databases/atlas_trac_db-wal databases/atlas_trac_db-shm" 2>&1; echo "=== dir after rm ==="; adb shell run-as $pkg ls databases 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5; echo "=== relaunch ==="; adb shell monkey -p $pkg -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; echo "=== db recreated? ==="; adb shell run-as $pkg ls databases 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5)
